YUNO_MOD_CARD_YUNO_STRIKE_CARD.title: Strike
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YUNO_DEFEND_CARD.title: Defend
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YAN_HU_SHE_JI_CARD.title: Cover Fire
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CHU_XUE_CARD.title: Bleed Out
YUNO_MOD_CARD_DU_QI_CARD.title: Poison Gas
YUNO_MOD_CARD_DU_QI_CARD.description: Apply {TotalPoison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies. Each use permanently increases this by {PoisonPerTurn:diff()}.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. [gold]Foresee[/gold] 3, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s). Transfer your [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] to the target.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WO_HUI_HAO_HAO_ZUO_DE_CARD: {InCombat:Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage|Deal {BasePow:diff()} damage}. [gold]Sword[/gold] [gold]Stance[/gold]: Deal damage equal to the base damage raised to the power of 2.5 instead.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_QING_KONG_DAN_JIA_CARD.des: {InCombat:Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.|Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, repeated for each Gun card you've played this combat.}
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YIN_BAO_CARD.title: Sonic Boom
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YIN_BAO_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to them. If the enemy already has Weak, also apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHA_WAN_LE_CARD.title: Killed Them All
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHA_WAN_LE_CARD.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies. Double their [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XUE_JIAN_CARD.title: Blood Splatter
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XUE_JIAN_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the target has [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XU_ZHA_CARD.title: Deception
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XU_ZHA_CARD.description: Transfer your [gold]Maim[/gold] to the target, then double its [gold]Maim[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIE_YIN_CARD.title: Swift Sound
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BAO_HU_NI_CARD.title: Protect You
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BAO_HU_NI_CARD.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Values increase by {IfUpgraded:show:twice} your [gold]Love[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_LIANG_REN_CARD.title: Draw Blade
YUNO_MOD_CARD_LIANG_REN_CARD.description: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. Add all [gold]Sword[/gold] cards to your hand.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WU_YI_ZHONG_TING_CARD.desc: Whenever you enter a [gold]Stance[/gold], draw {Draw:diff()} card(s).
YUNO_MOD_CARD_QU_KAN_XING_XING_CARD.desc: Discard up to {Discard:diff()} card(s). For each, gain 1 [gold]Love[/gold]. Draw cards equal to the number discarded.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIU_SHI_NI_CARD.title: Is It You?
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIU_SHI_NI_CARD.descriptio: Remove all [gold]Strength[/gold] from the target. Gain that much [gold]Strength[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WEI_LAI_PIAN_CHA_CARD.desc: If HP > 40% of Max HP: Take {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage (reducing HP to 40%) and gain that much [gold]Bandage[/gold]. Otherwise: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_DIAN_JI_QIANG_CARD.title: Stun Gun
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YOU_NAI_JIU_WO_CARD.title: Yuno, Save Me!
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIE_DU_JI_CARD.title: Antidote
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIE_DU_JI_CARD.description: Gain [Energy:energyIcons()] equal to the number of enemies with [gold]Poison[/gold]. If there is only 1 enemy in the room, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIAO_HUAN_CARD.title: Exchange
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIAO_HUAN_CARD.description: This turn, swap your [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. If they are equal, double both.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_KAN_PO_CARD.title: Insight
YUNO_MOD_CARD_AI_YI_YI_CHU_CARD.title: Love Overflow
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHAN_YOU_YU_CARD.title: Possessiveness
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHAN_YOU_YU_CARD.descripti: Choose a card in your hand. Double its energy cost and give it Replay 1.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHAN_YOU_YU_CARD.selection: Choose a card in your hand to double its cost and give it Replay 1.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XUE_BAI_CARD.title: Blood Rot
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XUE_BAI_CARD.description: Whenever an enemy takes [gold]Bleed[/gold] damage, gain {ZhiCanPowerCount:diff()} [gold]Maim[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BIE_XIANG_TAO_CARD.title: Don't Even Try to Run
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BIE_XIANG_TAO_CARD.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add {GrtCardCount:diff()} card(s) from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to your hand.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BIE_XIANG_TAO_CARD.selecti: Choose 1 card to add to your hand.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_TIAO_FEI_CARD.title: Launch
YUNO_MOD_CARD_TIAO_FEI_CARD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Choose a card in your hand to gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_TIAO_FEI_CARD.selectionScr: Choose 1 card in your hand to gain Retain
YUNO_MOD_CARD_NI_SHUO_SHEN_ME_CARD.title: What Did You Say!
YUNO_MOD_CARD_NI_SHUO_SHEN_ME_CARD.descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIE_HOU_CARD.title: Encounter
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIE_HOU_CARD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Each time you gain [gold]Love[/gold], reduce this card's cost by 1.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WO_TUI_CARD.title: My Idol
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WO_TUI_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain [gold]Love[/gold] equal to twice the unblocked damage dealt.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WO_CHUI_CARD.title: Hammer
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WO_CHUI_CARD.description: ALL enemies lose {DownStrength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn. If there is only 1 enemy, it loses {DownAloneStrength:diff()} instead.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHI_HENG_CARD.title: Balance
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHI_HENG_CARD.description: Set your [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold] to the same value (whichever is higher).
YUNO_MOD_CARD_PIAN_ZHI_CARD.title: Paranoia
YUNO_MOD_CARD_PIAN_ZHI_CARD.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card in your hand. Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to its cost.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHAN_GUANG_DAN_CARD.title: Flashbang
YUNO_MOD_CARD_PO_TING_CARD.title: Forced Stop
YUNO_MOD_CARD_PO_TING_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times. Add 1 Attack card from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] to your hand, then choose 1 card from your hand to discard.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_PO_TING_CARD.selectionScre: Choose 1 card from your draw pile to add to your hand
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CHAO_FU_HE_CARD.title: Overload
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CHAO_FU_HE_CARD.descriptio: Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s), then discard 1. [gold]Nimble[/gold]: Send {DiscardCount:diff()} card(s) from the top of your [gold]draw pile[/gold] to the [gold]discard pile[/gold], then draw 1.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_RUO_DIAN_JI_PO_CARD.title: Weakness Exploit
YUNO_MOD_CARD_RUO_DIAN_JI_PO_CARD.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to the enemy with the lowest HP {Repeat:diff()} times.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHI_SHOU_CARD.title: Slip
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHI_SHOU_CARD.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card from your [gold]discard pile[/gold]: Send {Cards:diff()} card(s) from the top of your [gold]draw pile[/gold] to the [gold]discard pile[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_NA_QI_WEI_LAI_CARD.title: Seize the Future
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XUN_QING_CARD.title: Lovers' Suicide
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SAO_SHE_CARD.title: Spray Fire
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SAO_SHE_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BU_DAO_CARD.title: Finishing Blow
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BU_DAO_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times. If the target has [gold]Weak[/gold] and its HP is {Threshold:diff()} or less, kill it.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIE_PO_CARD.title: Intimidation
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIE_PO_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Exhaust 1 card from your discard pile. [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]: Draw cards equal to the number of [gold]Suppress[/gold] cards in your [gold]discard pile[/gold]. {InCombat:(Draw {DrawCount:diff()} cards.)|}
YUNO_MOD_CARD_FU_JI_CARD.title: Axe Strike
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHA_LE_NI_CARD.title: I'll Kill You!
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHA_LE_NI_CARD.description:
Lose {LoseHp:diff()} HP. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Kill: Heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SI_SHA_CARD.title: Deathmatch
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SI_SHA_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, repeated for each enemy in the room.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_DE_SHOU_CARD.title: Success
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIANG_XIN_WO_CARD.title: Trust Me
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YI_JIA_LUAN_ZHEN_CARD.desc: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card. Attack: draw {Cards:diff()} card(s). Skill: play it. Power: gain [Energy:energyIcons()] equal to its cost.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CHENG_SHENG_ZHUI_JI_CARD.d: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. When you [gold]Foresee[/gold], add this card from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to your hand. Each time you play this, its damage permanently increases by {Growth:diff()}.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIN_NI_YI_CI_CARD.title: Trust You Once
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIN_NI_YI_CI_CARD.descript: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Add 1 [gold]Future Message[/gold] to your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZOU_BA_CARD.title: Let's Go
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZOU_BA_CARD.description: Gain {LoveCount:diff()} [gold]Love[/gold]. Trigger the end-of-turn effect of [gold]Love[/gold] once.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHENG_ZHE_WEI_LAI_CARD.des: [gold]Foresee[/gold] 3, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s). Drawn Attack cards without Replay gain [gold]Replay 1[/gold] (removed after playing).
YUNO_MOD_CARD_QIU_TI_CARD.title: Orb
YUNO_MOD_CARD_QIU_TI_CARD.description: {InCombat:Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {CalculatedDamage:diff()} times. Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).|Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, repeated for each Diary you hold. Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).}
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WEI_LAI_XUN_XI_CARD.title: Future Message
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHENG_YI_ZHI_XING_CARD.des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. {InCombat:Lose {CalculatedDamage:diff()} HP|Lose 10% of your Max HP}.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BAD_END_CARD.title: Bad End
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BAD_END_CARD.description: Lose {Damage:diff()} HP. Draw until your hand is full. Attack: ALL enemies gain 1 [gold]Bleed[/gold]. Skill: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Power: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YI_JI_BI_SHA_CARD.title: One-Hit Kill
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YI_JI_BI_SHA_CARD.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Exhaust all [gold]Suppress[/gold] cards in your [gold]discard pile[/gold]. [gold]Axe[/gold] [gold]Stance[/gold]: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_QU_SI_CARD.title: Die!
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CUI_XUE_CARD.title: Blood Quench
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZI_SHANG_CARD.title: Self-Harm
YUNO_MOD_CARD_NI_MEI_YONG_LE_CARD.title: You're Useless Now
YUNO_MOD_CARD_NI_MEI_YONG_LE_CARD.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If this kills a non-minion enemy, gain {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIAN_JI_CARD.title: Snare
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIAN_JI_CARD.description: Whenever you draw a card via an effect, apply {XianJiCount:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold] to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WEI_XIE_CARD.title: Threaten
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WEI_XIE_CARD.description: Mark an enemy. At the end of its turn, it takes damage equal to 50% of the damage it took this turn.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YIN_GUO_LV_DA_DIAN_TANG_CA: At the start of your turn, add {DiaryCount:diff()} [gold]Orb[/gold](s) to your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_GU_WANG_CARD.title: Lonely Gaze
YUNO_MOD_CARD_GU_WANG_CARD.description: {InCombat:Transform up to {VaryCount:diff()} cards in your hand into [gold]Orbs[/gold].|Transform up to Y cards in your hand into [gold]Orbs[/gold]. Y is the number of Diaries you hold.}
YUNO_MOD_CARD_GU_WANG_CARD.selectionScre: Choose cards in your hand to transform into Orbs
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHONG_YAN_CARD.title: The End
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHONG_YAN_CARD.description: Can only be played if you have more than 8 [gold]Love[/gold]. Gain 2 [gold]Love[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_GU_DU_ZOU_XIANG_YONG_YUAN_: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {CalculatedBlock:diff()} times (equal to total Vulnerable and Weak on ALL enemies). Each time you [gold]Foresee[/gold], reduce this card's cost by 2.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_HENG_QIE_CARD.title: Cross Cut
YUNO_MOD_CARD_HENG_QIE_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Double their [gold]Bleed[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YU_ZHI_CARD.title: Precognition
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YU_ZHI_CARD.description: Whenever you [gold]Foresee[/gold], ALL enemies gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold], then lose 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_AI_MU_CARD.title: Adoration
YUNO_MOD_CARD_AI_MU_CARD.description: If (hand size × 2 + [gold]discard pile[/gold] size) % energy spent = 0, gain X [Energy:energyIcons()], draw X cards, and gain {IfUpgraded:show:2X|X} [gold]Love[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_NI_ZHAO_SI_CARD.title: You Want to Die!
Apply {PowerCount:diff()} [gold]Maim[/gold] to ALL enemies. At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIN_JI_ZHENG_YI_HU_HUAN_CA: Can only be played if your HP is 40% or less. Deal Y damage to ALL enemies. Y equals your {IfUpgraded:show:Max HP|current HP}.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YI_YA_HUAN_YA_CARD.title: Tit for Tat
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YI_YA_HUAN_YA_CARD.descrip: Enemies that damage you gain {YiYaHuanYaPower:diff()} [gold]Revenge[/gold]. Damage you deal to yourself is treated as coming from ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YU_ZHI_MENG_CARD.title: Prophetic Dream
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YU_ZHI_MENG_CARD.descripti: Cards drawn via [gold]Foresee[/gold] cost 0 this turn.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WAN_QIAN_LUN_HUI_CARD.desc: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Damage is based on the number of times you've played the game.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHAN_HOU_BAO_ZA_CARD.title: Post-Battle Bandaging
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHAN_HOU_BAO_ZA_CARD.descr: When you take damage from an enemy, gain {IfUpgraded:show:50%|25%} of that amount as [gold]Bandage[/gold]. When you take damage from yourself, gain the same amount as [gold]Bandage[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHI_SHI_YUAN_BO_CARD.title: Knowledgeable
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHI_SHI_YUAN_BO_CARD.descr: [gold]Retrieve[/gold] 1 Rare card from a random class.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CI_TU_CARD.title: Lunge
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CI_TU_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Send {DuiMuCount:diff()} cards from the top of your draw pile to the discard pile. If any of them are Attack cards, deal damage {Repeat:diff()} additional time(s).
YUNO_MOD_CARD_LIAN_SHE_CARD.title: Burst Fire
YUNO_MOD_CARD_LIAN_SHE_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
Return this card to your [gold]hand[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WO_DAO_CARD.title: Take Cover
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WO_DAO_CARD.description: Discard your hand. For each card discarded, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JUE_YI_CARD.title: Resolve
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JUE_YI_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies Y times. Y equals your Love. {InCombat:
(Love: {LoveCount:diff()})|}
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHOU_HU_CARD.title: Protection
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHOU_HU_CARD.description: When you gain Love, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_LIAN_XI_CARD.title: Compassion
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHU_MU_CARD.title: Attention
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHU_MU_CARD.description: Automatically played when you gain Love. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHAN_CARD.title: Slash
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHAN_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Damage increases based on the previous two times this card's base damage was dealt (Fibonacci).
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ANCIENT_YAN_HU_SHE_JI_CARD: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times. Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_QI_DAO_CARD.title: Prayer
YUNO_MOD_CARD_QI_DAO_CARD.description: Add all cards from your discard pile into your draw pile, then send all cards from your draw pile to your discard pile.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YA_ZHI_CARD.title: Suppress
